value.found_quote: Sidecars are background processes that run alongside Antigravity. Antigravity manages the lifecycle of sidecars, automatically launching them and restarting them if they crash or error.
value.rationale: The page directly describes Sidecars as background processes that run alongside Antigravity, with Antigravity managing their lifecycle (auto-launching and restarting), and includes a "Runtime Data" section describing per-sidecar runtime data stored in sidecar_data directories. This fully substantiates the claim. No deprecation or sunset language is present, so it is treated as active.
